tools.name: list_test_cases
tools.description: List test cases for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

filterId.description: Saved filter ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: search_test_cases
tools.description: Search test cases by AQL query.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

rql.description: AQL (Allure Query Language) filter expression. Operators: = != ~= (contains) > < >= <= in [...] and or not. IMPORTANT: 'not in' is written as 'not field in [...]', NOT 'field not in [...]'. Test case fields: id, name, tag, issue, role["R"], member, cf["F"], cfv, layer, status, workflow, testPlan, automation (boolean), muted, mutedDate, createdDate, createdBy, lastModifiedDate, lastModifiedBy. Dates use 13-digit Unix ms timestamps. Examples: name ~= "login" | automation = true | automation = false | status = "Active" | tag in ["smoke", "regression"] | not tag in ["nightly"] | cf["Epic"] = "Auth" | name ~= "checkout" and muted = false | (createdBy = "a" or createdBy = "b") and automation = true

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case
tools.description: Get a test case by ID.

tools.name: create_test_case
tools.description: Create a new test case. payload.projectId defaults to ALLURE_PROJECT_ID env when omitted. payload.precondition (string) is the preconditions field — always use this for preconditions/prerequisites text, NOT payload.description. payload.description (string) is the general test case description — always populate this with a meaningful summary of what the test case verifies. payload.customFields supports values like { customField: { id }, id, name }. payload.steps is an optional array of step objects with { name (step text), expectedResult (optional expected result text) } — steps are created after the test case. When a step has multiple expected results, list them in expectedResult separated by semicolons (e.g. "Result A; Result B") or as a bullet list (lines starting with -, *, or a number).

tools.name: update_test_case_step
tools.description: Update a test case step by ID. Supports updating body text and/or expectedResult. If expectedResult is provided, the expected result node is created automatically if it does not exist yet.

stepId.description: Step ID to update. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

expectedResult.description: Expected result text for this step.

tools.name: update_test_case
tools.description: Update an existing test case. payload.customFields supports values like { customField: { id }, id, name }.

id.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: delete_test_case
tools.description: Delete a test case by ID.

tools.name: add_test_case_tags_bulk
tools.description: Add one or multiple tags to one or multiple test cases using bulk API.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: remove_test_case_tags_bulk
tools.description: Remove one or multiple tags from one or multiple test cases using bulk API.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tagId.description: Tag ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: add_test_case_external_links_bulk
tools.description: Add one or multiple external links to one or multiple test cases using bulk API.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_overview
tools.description: Get test case overview data.

tools.name: get_test_case_history
tools.description: Get test case run history.

id.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_scenario
tools.description: Get scenario for a test case.

id.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_steps
tools.description: Get manual scenario steps for a test case. Returns a normalized scenario with root step and a flat map of all steps (scenarioSteps), where each step contains body, expectedResult, children IDs, and optional sharedStepId.

id.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_tags
tools.description: Get tags assigned to a test case.

tools.name: set_test_case_tags
tools.description: Set tags for a test case.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_issues
tools.description: Get linked issues for a test case.

tools.name: set_test_case_issues
tools.description: Set linked issues for a test case.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: restore_test_case
tools.description: Restore a deleted test case.

tools.name: list_project_custom_fields
tools.description: List custom fields configured for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_custom_field_values
tools.description: List values for a custom field in a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

customFieldId.description: Custom field ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_custom_fields
tools.description: Get custom field values for a test case.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: set_test_case_custom_fields
tools.description: Add custom field values for a test case via bulk API. Supports grouped values [{ customField: { id }, values: [{ id|name }] }] and flat values [{ id|name, customField: { id } }].

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_test_case_attachments
tools.description: List attachments for a test case.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: upload_test_case_attachment
tools.description: Upload a file attachment to a test case. Provide file content as a base64-encoded string.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

filename.description: File name including extension, e.g. screenshot.png.

contentType.description: MIME type, e.g. image/png or application/pdf.

contentBase64.description: File content encoded as a base64 string.

tools.name: delete_test_case_attachment
tools.description: Delete an attachment from a test case by attachment ID.

attachmentId.description: Attachment ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_attachment_content
tools.description: Download the binary content of a test case attachment. Returns base64-encoded content with its MIME type.

attachmentId.description: Attachment ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_launches
tools.description: List launches for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

filterId.description: Saved filter ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: search_launches
tools.description: Search launches by AQL query.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

rql.description: AQL (Allure Query Language) filter expression. Operators: = != ~= (contains) > < >= <= in [...] and or not. IMPORTANT: 'not in' is written as 'not field in [...]', NOT 'field not in [...]'. Launch fields: id, name, tag, issue, job, ev["VAR"], evv, closed (boolean), createdDate, createdBy, lastModifiedDate, lastModifiedBy. Dates use 13-digit Unix ms timestamps. Examples: name ~= "nightly" | closed = false | closed = true | tag in ["release", "pre-release"] | job = "jenkins_master" | ev["OS"] = "Linux" | not tag in ["devbuild"] | name ~= "regression" and closed = true

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_launch
tools.description: Get a launch by ID.

tools.name: create_launch
tools.description: Create a new launch. payload.projectId defaults to ALLURE_PROJECT_ID env when omitted.

tools.name: update_launch
tools.description: Update an existing launch.

id.description: Launch ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: delete_launch
tools.description: Delete a launch by ID.

tools.name: close_launch
tools.description: Close an open launch.

tools.name: reopen_launch
tools.description: Reopen a closed launch.

tools.name: get_launch_statistic
tools.description: Get launch statistics.

tools.name: get_launch_progress
tools.description: Get launch progress widget data.

tools.name: add_test_cases_to_launch
tools.description: Add test cases to a launch.

id.description: Launch ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: add_test_plan_to_launch
tools.description: Add a test plan to a launch.

id.description: Launch ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_test_results
tools.description: List test results for a launch.

filterId.description: Saved filter ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: search_test_results
tools.description: Search test results by AQL query.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

rql.description: AQL (Allure Query Language) filter expression. Operators: = != ~= (contains) > < >= <= in [...] and or not. IMPORTANT: 'not in' is written as 'not field in [...]', NOT 'field not in [...]'. Test result fields: id, name, fullName, testCase, status, category, tag, issue, role["R"], member, testedBy, cf["F"], cfv, ev["VAR"], evv, layer, muted (boolean), hidden (boolean), launch, createdDate, createdBy, lastModifiedDate, lastModifiedBy. Dates use 13-digit Unix ms timestamps. Examples: status = "failed" | status in ["failed", "broken"] | name ~= "login" | muted = false | hidden = false | launch = "release-1.0" | ev["OS"] = "Linux" | not tag in ["nightly"] | status = "failed" and muted = false

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_result
tools.description: Get a test result by ID.

tools.name: create_test_result
tools.description: Create a new test result.

tools.name: update_test_result
tools.description: Update an existing test result.

id.description: Test result ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_result_history
tools.description: Get history for a test result.

id.description: Test result ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: assign_test_result
tools.description: Assign a test result. payload must include username.

id.description: Test result ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: resolve_test_result
tools.description: Resolve a test result. payload must include status.

id.description: Test result ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_test_plans
tools.description: List test plans for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_plan
tools.description: Get a test plan by ID.

tools.name: create_test_plan
tools.description: Create a new test plan. payload.projectId defaults to ALLURE_PROJECT_ID env when omitted.

tools.name: update_test_plan
tools.description: Update an existing test plan.

id.description: Test plan ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: delete_test_plan
tools.description: Delete a test plan by ID.

tools.name: run_test_plan
tools.description: Run a test plan by ID.

id.description: Test plan ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_automation_chart
tools.description: Get automation trend chart data for a project (test automation coverage over time).

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

from.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

to.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

offset.description: Timezone offset in minutes. Must be a number, not a string.

interval.description: Time interval for grouping. One of: "hour", "day", "week", "month".

tools.name: get_group_by_automation
tools.description: Get test case counts grouped by automation status for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_group_by_status
tools.description: Get test case counts grouped by status for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_launch_duration_histogram
tools.description: Get histogram of launch durations for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

from.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

to.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

buckets.description: Number of histogram buckets (default: 10). Must be a number, not a string.

tools.name: get_mute_trend
tools.description: Get trend of muted test cases over time for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

from.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

to.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

interval.description: Time interval for grouping. One of: "hour", "day", "week", "month".

tools.name: get_statistic_trend
tools.description: Get test result statistic trend over time for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

from.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

to.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

offset.description: Timezone offset in minutes. Must be a number, not a string.

interval.description: Time interval for grouping. One of: "hour", "day", "week", "month".

tools.name: get_tc_last_result
tools.description: Get last test result for each test case in a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_tc_success_rate
tools.description: Get test case success rate analytics over time for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

from.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

to.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

offset.description: Timezone offset in minutes. Must be a number, not a string.

interval.description: Time interval for grouping. One of: "hour", "day", "week", "month".

tools.name: list_dashboards
tools.description: List all dashboards for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: create_dashboard
tools.description: Create a new dashboard in a project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

shared.description: Whether the dashboard is shared with the project.

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Get a dashboard by ID.

id.description: Dashboard ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: update_dashboard
tools.description: Update dashboard fields (name, shared status, etc.).

id.description: Dashboard ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: delete_dashboard
tools.description: Delete a dashboard by ID.

id.description: Dashboard ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: copy_dashboard
tools.description: Copy an existing dashboard to the same or another project.

id.description: Source dashboard ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

projectId.description: Target project ID (defaults to source project).

tools.name: get_widget_data
tools.description: Get data for a specific dashboard widget.

id.description: Widget ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

projectId.description: Project ID for widget context. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

from.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

to.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp ms). Must be a number, not a string.

tools.name: suggest_users
tools.description: Search users by name or username for assignment and mention workflows. Returns a paginated list of matching users with their IDs and display names. Use this to look up a user before assigning a test result or test case.

query.description: Partial name or username to search for.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_project_members
tools.description: List members (collaborators) of a project with their roles and permission sets. Use this to discover who is on the project, what roles they have, and who to assign work to. Supports filtering by partial name via query parameter.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_launch_member_stats
tools.description: Get per-member workload statistics for a launch: how many test results each team member has been assigned or has resolved. Use this to understand workload distribution and identify team members who are overloaded or unassigned during a test run.

id.description: Launch ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_case_members
tools.description: Get the list of members (roles) assigned to a test case. Returns who owns, authored, or is responsible for this test case.

testCaseId.description: Test case ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_result_members
tools.description: Get the list of members assigned to a specific test result. Returns who is responsible for investigating or resolving this result.

testResultId.description: Test result ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_shared_steps
tools.description: List shared steps (reusable step library) for a project. Shared steps are referenced from test case scenarios via sharedStepId. Use this to discover the available shared step library before reading test case steps.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

archived.description: Filter by archived status. Omit to return active steps only.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_shared_step
tools.description: Get a shared step by ID. Returns metadata: name, project, archived status.

id.description: Shared step ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_shared_step_steps
tools.description: Get the full normalized scenario (list of steps) inside a shared step. This is the key tool for resolving sharedStepId references in test case scenarios: when get_test_case_steps returns a step with sharedStepId, call this tool to inline the actual step content. Returns the same NormalizedScenarioDto format as get_test_case_steps.

id.description: Shared step ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_shared_step_usage
tools.description: Get the list of test cases that use a specific shared step. Use this for impact analysis before editing or archiving a shared step: shows which test cases would be affected.

id.description: Shared step ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: create_shared_step
tools.description: Create a new shared step in a project. payload must include at minimum: name (string) and projectId (number). Use this to extract repeated test steps into a reusable library.

payload.description: Shared step creation data. Required fields: name, projectId.

tools.name: update_shared_step
tools.description: Update shared step metadata (name, etc.) by ID.

id.description: Shared step ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: archive_shared_step
tools.description: Archive a shared step to retire it from active use. Archived steps remain readable but are hidden from the active library. Run get_shared_step_usage first to check impact before archiving.

id.description: Shared step ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: unarchive_shared_step
tools.description: Restore an archived shared step back to active status.

id.description: Shared step ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_env_vars
tools.description: List all environment variable definitions (keys) available in the system. Environment variables track test configuration context: browser, OS, environment name, build number, etc. Use this to discover what ev[] keys are available before constructing AQL filters like ev["browser"] = "Chrome" or ev["os"] = "Linux" in search_test_results or search_launches.

tools.name: suggest_env_vars
tools.description: Search environment variable definitions by name. Returns matching env var keys with their IDs. Use this to find the exact name of an env var key before querying values.

query.description: Partial env var name to search for.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_env_var_schemas
tools.description: List environment variable schema definitions for a project. Schemas define which env var keys are tracked and displayed for launches in this project. Use this to understand what configuration context is captured per launch in a given project.

projectId.description: Project ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: list_env_var_values
tools.description: List all recorded values for a specific environment variable key. Returns the distinct values that have been used across test runs (e.g. all browser versions recorded). Use envVarId from list_env_vars. Useful for building precise AQL filters: know that ev["browser"] has values ["Chrome 123", "Firefox 115"].

envVarId.description: Environment variable ID from list_env_vars. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: suggest_env_var_values
tools.description: Search for recorded environment variable values by partial text. Optionally scope by envVarId, projectId, or launchId. Use this to autocomplete valid values for AQL ev[] filters before running a search.

query.description: Partial value text to search for.

envVarId.description: Filter by specific env var key ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

projectId.description: Scope to a project. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

launchId.description: Scope to a specific launch. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

page.description: Page number, 0-based. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

size.description: Page size. Must be a number (integer), not a string.

tools.name: get_test_result_env_vars
tools.description: Get the environment variable values recorded for a specific test result. Shows what configuration context (browser, OS, env name, build) this result ran against. Use this when investigating a failure to understand if the environment is a factor: e.g. 'does this only fail on Chrome 124 but not on Firefox?'

testResultId.description: Test result ID. Must be a number (integer), not a string.
